items.title: Surgeon sounded 'exhausted' a week before fatal crash, brother says

children.content: The brother of Royal Hobart Hospital doctor Artyom Avetisyan says the cardiothoracic surgery registrar sounded "extremely exhausted" in the week before his crash death.

children.content: Routine cases are dragging through Tasmanian courts for years as senior lawyers lament the "crisis" engulfing the state's criminal justice system.

items.title: Father dead, son hospitalised after crash in Tasmania's south

children.content: A man has died, and his son remains in hospital, following a single-vehicle crash in Blackmans Bay in Tasmania's south.

items.title: Joshua pulled over to help with what he thought was car trouble. Then he saw the knife

children.content: When Tasmanian man Joshua Smith stopped on a South Australian highway late at night, his gut instinct told him something wasn't right. His act, which has been recognised with a bravery award, helped save the lives of two boys.

articles.title: How a punt on a trial in Italy created the Socceroos' next star

children.content: Cristian Volpato was rejected by two Australian soccer academies. His family dropped everything to go for a trial in Italy. That was the making of Australia's next star.

items.title: ABC presenter Trevor Chappell to hang up mic after 26 years

items.title: Midwife hit with $70,000 foreign investment tax after moving to Australia

children.content: A British midwife who migrated to Australia to work at a regional hospital during statewide staff shortages is calling for changes to the law after being slugged $70,000 by state and federal authorities for the purchase of her home.

children.content: Labor wants to double the fines for tech giants who refuse to hand over documents that could prove they are failing to enforce Australia’s social media age ban.

items.title: 'Had to do something': As auction clearance rates drop PM defends policy

children.content: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese issues an impassioned defence of CGT changes from the budget and Australia's multicultural society.
He says house prices will continue to increase, but by a by a lesser amount making the system fairer for homebuyers.
The PM says the auction results are encouraging.

children.content: Andy Burnham, the British MP tipped to replace the outgoing prime minister Sir Keir Starmer, promised "radical change" to the nation's "broken" political system as he laid out his vision to lead the country on Monday.

items.title: Court rejects Trump's final bid to overturn E Jean Carroll verdict

items.title: The medicine safety system most Australians have never heard of

children.content: A little black triangle on medicine information leaflets is meant to make it easier to report adverse effects of new medications. Problem is, many Australians don't know what it means.

items.title: Simpson Desert has never looked better but where are the tourists?

items.title: 'I don't take that trust lightly': Jo Clay elected new ACT Greens leader

items.title: Vanuatu critical infrastructure to remain 'free from militarisation' under pact
